subject: WM-0178 ready for review
body: Reviewed production admission passed once; six filters and the full canonical suite each ran once at 9 samples/2 warmups with zero invariant mismatches and full 15 OK/0 WARN/0 FAIL; imported hashed evidence; typecheck, focused tests, boundaries, handoff, taskctl, diff and quality all pass; baseline/WM-0083 unchanged; no retry, waiver or downstream state change.
